title: The Leopard
writer: Giuseppe Tomasi di Lampedusa, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Pasquale Festa Campanile
actors: Burt Lancaster, Alain Delon, Claudia Cardinale
plot: The Prince of Salina, a noble aristocrat of impeccable integrity, tries to preserve his family and class amid the tumultuous social upheavals of 1860s Sicily.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 10 wins & 6 nominations total
